title: agropyron pendulinum
intro: Agropyron pendulinum, also known as false wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Agropyron pendulinum include its ability to soothe the stomach, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. Agropyron pendulinum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and herbal remedies.
